      New Recipe

      Choose a Recipe

      No recipes yet — add some first!

      Import Options

      In Mealie, go to Admin → Backups and download a backup .zip file. Drop it below — everything is parsed locally, nothing is uploaded.

      📦
      Drop your mealie_*.zip here
      or browse to select

      Export individual recipes from Mealie as JSON, then paste below.

      Enter your Mealie instance URL and an API key (Profile → API Tokens in Mealie). Refectory will import all your recipes automatically.

      Import a previously exported Refectory backup (.zip). Restores recipe data and/or images depending on which export type you used.

      📦
      Drop your refectory-backup-*.zip here
      or browse to select

      Export Recipes

      🗂️ Full Backup

      All recipe data (title, ingredients, steps, tags, etc.) plus any images stored on this device. Import this on any browser to fully restore your recipes.

      🖼️ Images Only

      Just the images from this device's local storage. Use this to transfer images to a second device that already has your recipes synced from the worker.

      Settings

      Profile
      Account   Guest

      You're using Refectory as a guest. Create a free account to sync your recipes across devices.

      Sync Token
      Copy this token to sign in on another device.
      —
      Use existing token
      Sign in with a token from another device.
      Your Cloudflare Worker endpoint for syncing.
      Sync now
      Danger Zone
      Clear all imported recipes
      Removes only recipes imported from Mealie. Hand-entered recipes are kept.
      Wipe all recipes
      Permanently deletes every recipe. Cannot be undone.

      Import from URL

      Paste the URL of any recipe page. Works best with sites that use structured recipe data.
